cases.symptom: Remote workers can SSH to the scheduler but fail during post-install because the configured cluster share is not writable on the worker.
cases.proposed_diagnosis: The worker cannot reach the scheduler over SSH.
cases.root_cause: The original diagnosis confuses SSH reachability with shared-storage availability; the worker needs the scheduler-side AGI_CLUSTER_SHARE mounted through SSHFS at the worker data path.
weak_assumptions: SSH login success proves the shared data path is usable.
Scheduler and worker paths must be identical across operating systems.
The install error is an app dependency issue rather than a cluster-share contract issue.

evidence.description: Non-interactive SSH to the worker succeeds.
post_install fails while resolving AGI_CLUSTER_SHARE on the worker.
The scheduler uses a macOS path and the worker uses a Linux home path.

candidate_fixes.summary: Keep scheduler AGI_CLUSTER_SHARE as source and mount it on workers with SSHFS before post-install.
Require all workers to use the scheduler absolute path.

regression_tests.description: Run share-check-only doctor with scheduler and remote worker paths.
Run worker post-install after the SSHFS mount is prepared.
Simulate an existing stale mount and verify remount logic.

cases.symptom: The PIPELINE DAG preview shows completed project steps after lab_steps.toml has been edited.
cases.proposed_diagnosis: The DAG renderer is caching Graphviz output.
cases.root_cause: The runner-state preview did not compare the project-step digest or latest run-log timestamp before reusing previous execution evidence.
cases.plain_repro: Run a pipeline, edit lab_steps.toml, reopen PIPELINE and inspect runner_state.json.
weak_assumptions: A visual rendering issue explains stale execution status.
A successful previous run remains valid after the project step contract changes.

evidence.description: The saved runner state contains a digest for the previous lab_steps.toml.
The latest pipeline log is older than the edited lab_steps.toml.

candidate_fixes.summary: Derive DAG status from run logs and mark previews stale when steps are newer than evidence.
Delete runner_state.json every time the PIPELINE page renders.

regression_tests.description: Verify completed steps are reflected from run logs.
Verify failed step and blocked downstream status are reflected from run logs.
Verify lab_steps.toml newer than log marks preview stale.
